programme.title: Mob Wives: Life Sentences
programme.desc: The day of Eddie's sentencing has finally arrived and Alicia anxiously awaits the outcome. Meanwhile, Renee meets with a lawyer to discuss possible legal options after receiving a letter from Junior and a missed phone call from jail.

programme.title: Mob Wives: Renee's Had Enough
programme.desc: Drita's dinner party takes an ugly turn when Renee blames Alicia's insecurity for their issues.

programme.title: Mob Wives: Season Finale
programme.desc: With Alicia's sentencing only days away, the moment she's been dreading for years is now upon her. Renee confesses that she has been writing a steamy sex novel in private and plans to have a book release party to celebrate her new venture.

programme.title: Mob Wives: The Reunion
programme.desc: Hosted by Sherri Shepherd. Drita, Renee, Ang, Alicia and Natalie sit down for an explosive, often funny and shockingly intense look back at the past season.

programme.title: Mob Wives: The Realest B*!ch is Back
programme.desc: Emotions run high and Staten Island is rife with gossip, lies, and misunderstandings. In this world, you never know what's around the corner - or when an old family connection may resurface to shake everything up.

programme.title: Mob Wives: Storm A-Brewin'
programme.desc: Karen and Natalie continue to face off at Big Ang's party igniting an even bigger rivalry between them. After the mayhem at her bar Ang is fed up with the girls and seeks some much needed advice from an unexpected source.

programme.title: Mob Wives: RATalie
programme.desc: Ang and Renee try to put their differences aside with the help of Ang's surprise guest at their long awaited sit-down.

programme.title: Mob Wives: Digging Up Dirt
programme.desc: Renee begins to spiral out of control after hearing of her ex husband's latest betrayal and her son's unexpected accident that lands him in an emergency room.

programme.title: Mob Wives: Philly vs. Philly
programme.desc: After Renee and Ang's unexpected brawl at Drita's party, Karen attempts to play mediator in order to get the core Staten Island crew back together.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Laura Garza told friends she was going on a night out at the Marquee Club. When she didn't show for work the next day a search ensued to find her as well as the men she left with.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Mary Ann Perez left a bar just outside of New Orleans. Early the next morning, her family received a call from an anonymous woman, mentioning Mary had run into car trouble. She never returned home.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The story of the tragic murder of Brett Wentworth, how police tracked his killer down and how advanced forensic technology was key to solving the case.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: When Wendy Speakes was found dead wearing a strangers' shoes, police launched an investigation into who could have murdered a well-loved member of a quiet community.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Sharon Whelan and her two daughters were murdered in their home on Christmas eve by a cold and calculating killer. Multi-discipline forensics uncovered his horrific actions and brought him to justice.
programme.sub-title: The Murders of Sharon, Zarah and Nadia Whelan

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The Murder of Imette St Guillen explores the hours and events leading up to her horrific death and the large-scale police investigation that identified her killer.
programme.sub-title: The Murder of Imette St Guillen

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: In February 2012, a man got into a pick-up truck at a mall close to his home and was never seen alive again. Nine months later, after a huge search was launched, police discovered his human remains.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Following the investigation into Brianna's kidnapping and murder and how police and forensics identified her killer.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Following the investigation into the death of Nikitta Grender and the extensive forensics that identified her killer.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Monstrous Murder in Morena is the story of how a dedicated police team and cutting-edge forensics solved Angela Kleinsorge's murder after 25 years.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The search for Lori Hackingfollows the investigation into her disappearance and how a multitude of forensic techniques revealed her killer.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The investigation into the shooting and how the FBI and FMPD identified the killer and brought him to justice.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: On 28th February 2001, the body of a woman was found at the bottom of the stairs of her home in North Dublin, Ireland. What initially looked like an accident, soon turned into a murder investigation.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: In January 1992, when an estate agent went missing, both police and her family feared the worst. For 25-year-old Stephanie Slater, it was the start of an 8 day ordeal defined by torture and terror.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: On 17th September 2006, emergency services were called to a blaze in Pinyon Pines. A house was engulfed in flames and three burned bodies were discovered inside. It soon became clear this was no accident.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The Fridge Killer follows the investigation into a truly spine-chilling murder in Nevada, that led police to uncover a serial killer.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The 36 year investigation into Virginia Freeman's murder and the forensics that identified her killer.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Covering the 38-year investigation into Jeannie Moore's murder.

programme.title: South Park: Fat Butt and Pancake Head
programme.desc: Fat Butt and Pancake Head: When Cartman wins a diversity event with his offensive hand puppet impersonation of Jennifer Lopez, Kyle is enraged. Soon the real J-Lo turns up, mightily peeved! (S7, E05)

programme.title: South Park: Lil' Crime Stoppers
programme.desc: Lil' Crime Stoppers: Stan, Kyle, Cartman and Kenny decide to play detective; they go around the town solving minor "crimes" for a dollar. It's not long before they're busting meth labs! (S7, E06)

programme.title: South Park: Red Man's Greed
programme.desc: Red Man's Greed: When the entire town is bought out by a Native American casino, the boys come up with a plan to get their homes back - but is more gambling really the solution? (S7, E07)

programme.title: South Park: South Park Is Gay
programme.desc: South Park is Gay! The TV show Queer Eye For The Straight Guy is sweeping the nation and the men of South Park are embracing metrosexuality, but what evil plan are the hosts plotting? (S7, E08)

programme.title: South Park: Christian Rock Hard
programme.desc: Christian Hard Rock: The boys form a band called Moop, but disagree on what direction they should take. Cartman leaves the band and bets them he will have a platinum record first! (S7, E09)

programme.title: South Park: Grey Dawn
programme.desc: Grey Dawn: There's an epidemic in South Park. An epidemic of senior citizen related driving accidents! When their licenses are all revoked they decide to fight back military style! (S7, E10)

programme.title: South Park: Casa Bonita
programme.desc: Casa Bonita: Cartman is overjoyed at going to a Mexican restaurant for Kyle's birthday but is crushed when he finds out Butters is invited instead. He'll have to make Butters "disappear". (S7, E11)

programme.title: South Park: All About Mormons
programme.desc: All About The Mormons: A new family moves to South Park and their son Gary is an unusually perfect Mormon - this angers the boys no end! Will Stan beat him up or go for a family dinner?! (S7, E12)

programme.title: South Park: Butt Out
programme.desc: Butt Out: When the boys' smoking leads to a nasty incident, it's the cigarettes that are blamed rather than them. Cue the glutinous Rob Reiner to arrive in town with his anti-smoking lobby! (S7, E13)

programme.title: South Park: Raisins
programme.desc: Raisins: When Wendy breaks up with Stan he takes it hard. The boys decide to take him to the restaurant Raisins, where all of the employees are preteen girls who enjoy wearing heavy make-up. (S7, E14)

programme.title: South Park: It's Christmas In Canada
programme.desc: It's Christmas In Canada: A law is passed in Canada, meaning poor lil' Ike must return to his biological parents. The boys set out to stop this but who is the evil mastermind behind the law? (S7, E15)

programme.title: South Park: Good Times with Weapons
programme.desc: Good Times With Weapons: After buying martial arts weapons at a local flea market, the boys are transformed into anime Japanese Warriors, with dire consequences for poor Professor Chaos. (S8, E01)

programme.title: South Park: AWESOM-O
programme.desc: AWESOM-O: When Cartman disguises himself as a robot in order to play a prank on Butters, he ends up being used by movie execs to come up with film ideas and captured by the military! (S8, E05)

programme.title: South Park: Up the Down Steroid
programme.desc: Up The Down Steroid: Jimmy is due to take part in the Special Olympics but what dodgy substance is he talked into taking? Cartman fakes being disabled so he can enter and win a $1,000. (S8, E02)

programme.title: South Park: Goobacks
programme.desc: Goobacks: South Park is swamped by workers from the future, who take all the jobs for less pay. The men of South Park go to unusual lengths to stop them. "Dey turk err jurbs!" (S8, E07)

programme.title: South Park: The Jeffersons
programme.desc: The Jeffersons: A new family arrive in South Park with a little boy called Blanket, a fairground in the garden and a dad with a penchant for singing and cosmetic surgery. Guess who? Shamone! (S8, E06)

programme.title: South Park: Douche and Turd
programme.desc: Douche and Turd: The pupils of South Park Elementary are called to vote for a new mascot. With the choices being a "giant douche" and a "turd sandwich" is there any point? (S8, E08)

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: It's the debut of the famous Team Firestorm, with their Groundhog machine.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: King Buxton and Team 101 enter the competition and mark the beginning of their rivalry.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: A fierce battle to determine the final set of semi-finalists.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Two of the most famous roboteers make their debuts - Roger Plant, the captain of team Big Cheese, and Nick Adams, the captain of The Adams Family.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: More robots go into battle, with only a pair of 12V batteries to power them.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: In the first semi-final, the remaining robots have to pair off and fight to the death.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The Gauntlet makes its final appearance in the second semi-final.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Four survivors come together in the ultimate home-made robotic showdown - and only one of them can claim victory.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Eight more robots battle to win the last available place in the semi-final.
programme.sub-title: The Second Wars: The Grudge Matches

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: A compilation of highlights to end the series in which contestants guide home-made robots through mechanical challenges.
programme.sub-title: The Second Wars: The Best Of Robot Wars

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: An insightful behind-the-scenes look into how the second season of `Robot Wars' was made.
programme.sub-title: The Second Wars: Making of Robot Wars

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Dogs enter the ring as they munch and crunch their way into victory. Some will let off steam while others sends out flames of destruction.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The competitors waste no time getting stuck into the fray in the four way melees, with one robot seemingly dominating the competition. The house robots may be a little rusty as a robot launches an attack.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Heat C welcomes back familiar faces in the arena, as former champions return with old tricks up their sleeves.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Challengers from more than five main competitions battle for supremacy. In a David versus Goliath battle, Dantomkia takes on the might of Behemoth in an attempt to throw it out of the arena.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Sir Chromalot returns to the arena to take on seven other mean machines. Steve must raise its previous form to send others tumbling.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The robots battle it out to send the crowd wild and their competition to robot heaven. Plus, 259 proves to be a genuine top contender.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Both old and new contenders must endure and evade the traps in the arena, full of flippers and pits. Meanwhile, Demolition Man is on a mission.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Tornado proves to be a strong contender in the arena, while house robots test the strength of newbies and push their limit.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Learn more about this infamous Robot and the family that built it. With an unforgettable design and devastating weapon, the Hypno-Disc competitor became an instant icon.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Debuting in the Second Wars, to becoming the most successful Robot ever to take part in Robot Wars. The Razer Robot put the squeeze on all the competition, including the House Robots.

programme.title: A Haunting: Demon Child
programme.desc: Jan’s young son Cody begins communicating with an imaginary friend. She calls on a shaman.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Calling
programme.desc: Rebecca hears spirits but is able to ignore them until one emerges who refuses to be ignored.

programme.title: A Haunting: Dark Dreams
programme.desc: A nightmare starts when Chris starts renovating his family dream house. A ghost haunts the home. Only with the help of paranormal investigators, priests, psychics, and shamans does Chris figure out a way to protect his family and "evict" the evil spirit.

programme.title: A Haunting: Norman the Doll
programme.desc: Paranormal investigator, Stephen Lancaster, doesn’t believe in haunted objects until he captures proof the doll he recently acquired is haunted. Fearing he is in over his head, he attempts to get rid of it, but the doll has other plans.

programme.title: A Haunting: Buried Secrets
programme.desc: Strange sounds and eerie sensations lead Charles Gonzales to suspect that a spirit haunts his Florida home. Charles asks Desiree to investigate his home. There, Desiree encounters the vicious spirit who seeks to keep Charles in its clutches forever.

programme.title: A Haunting: Masks Of Terror
programme.desc: Jeanette Osborne treats herself to a set of Haitian masks to decorate her California dream home. But shortly after, strange activity leads her to conclude that the masks are to blame.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Dark Side
programme.desc: The Wilcott’s 5-year-old son is attacked by an unseen entity. Their only hope is an exorcism.

programme.title: A Haunting: Bewitched
programme.desc: All appears to be on track when Sidney moves his pregnant girlfriend into the home he shares with his mother. But their happiness is suddenly shattered when an ex-friend is trying to tear the couple apart through witchcraft and has endangered everyone.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Uninvited
programme.desc: Meriden, Connecticut natives Lynn and Jason Ryder purchase a historic restaurant, thinking it will be an adventure to operate an establishment so much a part of their youth. Little do they know their experience is about to turn into their worst nightmare.

programme.title: A Haunting: House of the Dead
programme.desc: Unseen intruders attack 10-year-old Billy Bean. He struggles to learn the secrets of the house.

programme.title: A Haunting: Demon Whispers
programme.desc: When Phil Pritchard’s beloved father dies, he falls into a deep depression that renders him vulnerable to an unearthly evil that begins influencing him and will stop at nothing to render him a pawn in its relentless thirst for misery and murder.

programme.title: A Haunting: Curse Of The Mummy
programme.desc: On a visit to an exhibit of ancient Egyptian artifacts, Caleb Weaver experiences a chilling encounter with an unwrapped mummy and unleashes the wrath of a vile beast. Now stronger and more furious than ever, it seeks to possess Caleb.

programme.title: A Haunting: Legend Trippers
programme.desc: High school classmates test out an old ghost story on Halloween night.

programme.title: A Haunting: Conjuring Evil
programme.desc: Harold and Cindy have found the perfect retreat in suburban Alaska for their family. But after their daughter begins to experiment in witchcraft, she unknowingly attracts the attention of a dark entity. Harold calls in experts to help reclaim the home.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Haunting of Summerwind
programme.desc: Ginger moves her family into an old mansion. A supernatural presence torments her husband.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Possessed
programme.desc: Mary Vogel, a spiritual counselor for ten years, has a run in with a demonic force.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Shadowman
programme.desc: Tim Yancey and his older brother Tom love playing in the woods surrounding their Florida home. One afternoon Tom senses a presence watching him from among the shadows. Days later, the same entity confronts Tim and chases him through the woods.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Haunting Of Allen House
programme.desc: Professor Mark Spencer and his wife Rebecca have just purchased the historic Allen House in Arkansas. Shortly after moving in, Rebecca comes face to face with a faceless spirit. Mark calls investigators to determine if the spirit means them harm.

programme.title: Britain's Darkest Taboos
programme.desc: Rakeim Regan Pat, whose son had been killed in a gang shooting years earlier, was attacked by the perpetrator who she was caring for after he had been admitted to hospital.
programme.sub-title: My Mum Was Stabbed To Death By My Son

programme.title: Britain's Darkest Taboos
programme.desc: Stalker Al Amin Dhalla began a campaign of terror against former girlfriend, Alison Hewitt. The couple were in a relationship for over a year before Alison's mother became suspicious of Dhalla and hired a private investigator.
programme.sub-title: The Race To Catch My Stalker

programme.title: The Real Story of...
programme.desc: The struggle of chief engineer Mike Perry as he disables the ship and works to save the crew.

programme.title: The Real Story of...

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 7
programme.desc: When Toph discovers a quick way to make cash, Katara disapproves, and the rift between them has disastrous consequences.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 8
programme.desc: In a spooky village, Katara makes a special connection; the group investigate strange disappearances that occur during full moons.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 9
programme.desc: On the eve of the eclipse, Aang's worry overtakes him and his dreams become nightmares. Before long, he can't tell the difference between what's real and what's not.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 10
programme.desc: With the day of the eclipse upon them, the kids, along with a ragtag force of old friends, enact their long-planned invasion of the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 11
programme.desc: As the invasion force fights their way to the Fire Nation capital, the kids help Aang find the Firelord in time for the eclipse, but after a few surprises.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 12
programme.desc: When the group seek refuge at the Western Air temple, they find someone they weren't expecting has been following them and hopes to join their group.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 13
programme.desc: As Zuko teaches Aang firebending, it turns out Aang isn't the only one who needs a lesson. The two set-out to learn the true meaning of Firebending from the original teachers.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 14
programme.desc: Sokka and Zuko head to the Fire Nation's most heavily guarded prison - the Boiling Rock - in hopes to find and break-out the captured invasion force.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 15
programme.desc: Sokka and Zuko have to rethink their escape plan after things go wrong. They end up getting help from a few unexpected sources.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 16
programme.desc: Katara sets out to confront the Fire Nation soldier who killed her mother. However, no one knows what she will do when she finds him.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 17
programme.desc: When the kids see a new play about themselves and all of their past adventures, they aren't happy with the production.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 18
programme.desc: The kids learn new information about Firelord Ozai's master plan and decide to strike sooner than planned, but they are unsure if Aang is ready.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 19
programme.desc: While Firelord Ozai begins his master plan, the gang tries to stop him. Meanwhile, Aang seeks advice from his past lives.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 20
programme.desc: Suki, Toph, and Sokka try to stop the Fire Lord's fleet before they hit land, while Azula prepares for her coronation day.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 21
programme.desc: Sokka and Toph manage to disable the airships while Zuko and Katara confront Azula. Aang finally faces off against the Fire Lord.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 1
programme.desc: Katara and Sokka, a brother and sister from the Southern Water Tribe, discover a twelve-year-old boy frozen in an iceberg. Katara wonders if this boy is the Avatar whom the world has been awaiting.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 2
programme.desc: Prince Zuko, a young Firebender whose mission in life is to capture the Avatar, tracks Aang down to the Southern Water Tribe village where Katara and Sokka live.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 3
programme.desc: Aang is eager to take Sokka and Katara to the Air Temple where he was raised. But upon arrival, it becomes apparent that the temple is not at all how Aang remembers it.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 4
programme.desc: When locals of a small island discover Aang is the Avatar, they treat him like a celebrity.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 5
programme.desc: Aang takes Katara and Sokka to an Earthbender city. The kids cause damage and are brought before a crazy old king, who seems to enjoy messing with the kids' heads.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 6
programme.desc: The kids come to an Earth Nation town which is occupied by the Fire Nation. But will Katara's attempts to inspire the oppressed people help them or hurt them?

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 7
programme.desc: Aang, Katara, and Sokka arrive at a town being terrorized by a mysterious force from the spirit world. Aang doesn't know how to help these people, and realizes he has much to learn about being Avatar.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 8
programme.desc: During the winter solstice, Aang must reach a Fire Nation temple while dodging Prince Zuko, Commander Zhao, and the Fire Sages who guard it.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 9
programme.desc: When Katara's desire to master Waterbending gets the best of her, the kids find themselves on the run from pirates.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 10
programme.desc: Our heroes' friendship is tested when they meet Jet, a charismatic teenager leading a band of rebels who are fighting against the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 11
programme.desc: When Aang and friends come to the rim of a giant canyon, they are asked to help guide two groups of refugees across. Aang quickly learns that this will be no easy task.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 12
programme.desc: A powerful storm brings up painful memories of the past - and puts everyone in jeopardy in the present.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 13
programme.desc: When Sokka and Katara get too sick to travel, Aang goes out on his own to find a cure for them. But he is captured by Zhao and held prisoner inside an impenetrable fortress.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 14
programme.desc: Aang, Katara, and Sokka discover a village of people who are all reliant on a fortuneteller in their everyday lives but they are so reliant that they are blind to the imminent danger they are all in.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 15
programme.desc: Aang feels insecure when Katara and Sokka come across something that reminds them of home. Because Aang thinks his friends might leave him, he hides an important message which only leads to trouble.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 16
programme.desc: Aang attempts to find a Firebending master to teach him while Katara learns that she possesses a special power.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 17
programme.desc: After hearing rumors about surviving Airbenders, the kids journey to the Northern Air temple to see for themselves. What they find there could spell disaster for all enemies of the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 18
programme.desc: The kids reach the Northern Water tribe, and Aang and Katara look for a Waterbending Master as Sokka falls for a princess. Zuko must find a way to continue his quest for the Avatar.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 19
programme.desc: The Northern Water Tribe braces itself for an attack by Admiral Zhao's Fire Navy fleet. Aang struggles to defend the city. He wonders if there isn't a better way to use his Avatar abilities.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 20
programme.desc: Zhao's invasion breaks through the outer wall of the Northern Water Tribe's defenses, and he reveals a sinister plan. Aang goes to the spirit world for help.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 1
programme.desc: Aang and the group meet an Earth Kingdom general who wants to use Aang's powerful `Avatar State' as a weapon to defeat the Fire Nation. But it's more difficult than Aang thinks.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 2
programme.desc: On the way to Omashu, the kids meet some nomads who show them a shortcut through the `cave of two lovers'. When they get lost in the caves, they must trust in love to escape.

programme.desc: House of Ha comedians are disappearing, right in the middle of their acts.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Bebop and Rocksteady Conquer the Universe
programme.desc: When Bebop and Rocksteady steal the Anxietron Ray, they use it to scare the dickens out of everyone in their path, including the Turtles.
programme.sub-title: Bebop and Rocksteady Conquer the Universe

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Raphael Meets His Match
programme.desc: Billionaire McDonald Crump makes the smallest pizzas in the world, and gives the biggest parties.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Slash - The Evil Turtles from Dimension X
programme.desc: Using some of Shredder's and Krang's supercharged mutagen, Bebop and Rocksteady turn pet turtle Slash into an evil super mutant.
programme.sub-title: Slash - The Evil Turtles from Dimension X

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Leonardo Lightens Up
programme.desc: Tired of constant nagging about discipline, Raphael, Michelangelo and Donatello use a Personality Modifier on Leonardo to get him to lighten up.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Were-Rats of Channel Six
programme.desc: Finding a canister of unstable mutagen, the Rat King turns April and Vernon of Channel Six News into giant were-rats. As the transformed newshounds terrorize the city, Bebop and Rocksteady arrive to collect some explosives for Shredder and Krang.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Funny-They Shrunk Michelangelo
programme.desc: Talbot Breech is short, fussy and the insane inventor of a shrinking ray. His hobby is to miniaturize the biggest ships afloat; only today, he's caught Michelangelo in his diabolical ray.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Big Zipp Attack!
programme.desc: Intent on stealing the Lofty Tower's rigidium spire, Shredder lets a dreaded Zipp loose on the city as a tactical diversion.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Donatello Makes Time
programme.desc: Donatello's newest invention, the Time Stopper, has fallen into the hands of unconventional scientist Lloyd Cycloyd.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Farewell, Lotus Blossom
programme.desc: Using a devious deception, Shredder tricks Lotus Blossom into fighting the Turtles for possession of the burial urn of Chakahachi, an ancient Japanese magician.

programme.title: Rebel Without a Fin
programme.desc: In a dark plot to rule the world, Dr. Polidorius has created a man-fish using an evolution accelerator.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Rhino-Man
programme.desc: When multi-billionaire J. Gordon Hungerdunger sponsors a superhero competition, the city goes crazy with good guys.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Michelangelo Meets Bugman
programme.desc: Meet Bugman: he's Michelangelo's favourite comic book mutant superhero of all time. And today, he's real and in trouble.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Poor Little Rich Turtle
programme.desc: Desperate for the formula to Shellhammer Chemical's super rocket fuel, Krang and Shredder send Rocksteady and Bebop to kidnap poor little rich brat Buffy Shellhammer.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): What's Michelangelo Good For?
programme.desc: Dr. Lesseau is stealing animals from the city zoo to use for experiments.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Dimension X Story
programme.desc: April and Vernon of Channel Six News each need a big story, and Shredder's challenge to the Turtles of a fight to the finish sounds like just the ticket.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Donatello's Degree
programme.desc: To pick up a correspondence course degree addressed to "Miss Donna Tello," Donatello talks Irma into playing genius-for-a-day.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Big Cufflink Caper
programme.desc: When Shredder hires gonzo gangster Big Louie to find the explosive Cufflinks of Cathay, the Turtles go undercover with the mob to get to the bottom of the plot. Gunfights galore lead to a final shootout at the taffy factory at high midnight.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Leonardo Versus Tempestra
programme.desc: Tempestra's Revenge, the toughest game in video arcade, has got Leonardo hooked. Just as he's finally about to beat the machine, lightening strikes, and an electrical overload brings the wicked Tempestra to life.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Splinter Vanishes!
programme.desc: First Master Splinter vanishes, leaving behind instructions that the Ninja Turtles must now disband and go their separate ways.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Raphael Drives Em' Wild
programme.desc: Raphael's brain inadvertently gets switched with that of Oscar the cab driver.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Beyond the Donatello Nebula
programme.desc: Donatello's efforts to contact life in the Turtle Nebula succeed only too well: he accidently transports a space-traveling lizard named Algy down to Earth.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Big Bug Blunder
programme.desc: After Bebop and Rocksteady ruin an experimental batch of mutagen, Krang discovers that this new goo grows giant-sized insects. Shredder immediately sends some of the humongous bugs to Earth.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Foot Soldiers are Revolting
programme.desc: Desperate for decent henchmen, Shredder decides to make some minions he can rely on, and uses Krang's brain wave enhancer on a robotic foot soldier.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Unidentified Flying Leonardo
programme.desc: Investigating reports of UFOs in the country town of High Falls, April uncovers a real scheme.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Turtles and the Hare
programme.desc: In Krang's latest scheme, Rocksteady and Bebop, dressed as Easter bunnies, are blasting people with a Docilizer Ray and turning them into timid, rabbit-like people.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Once Upon a Time Machine
programme.desc: Hokum Hare discovers that Shredder has a time train to travel to the future, where he can become crimelord of a crime-free era.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Michelangelo Meets Mondo Gecko
programme.desc: Michelangelo is turtle-napped by mutant lizard Mondo Gecko, who was mutated at the same time and place as the Turtles.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Enter: Mutagen Man
programme.desc: Krang plans to use a large rocket's vapour trail to rain mutagen over the city when nerdy delivery boy Seymour Guts falls into Shredder's mutagen vat.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Donatello's Badd Time
programme.desc: Hillybilly crooks Bedelia Badd and sons Bufrod and Bubbaheist the Turtles new improved van, using it to steal the diamond in Dr. Kepple's Powercizer, which drains the city's power and could destroy it.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Michelangelo Meets Bugman - Again!
programme.desc: The Swatter threatens to destroy the city with a stolen swarm of super termites unless the Turtles meet him atop The Entire State Building.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Muckman Messes Up!
programme.desc: Krang sends Shredder, Rocksteady and Bebop after new mutagen Compound X-7, which Krang thinks will un-mutate Turtles. At lab, garbagemen are doused with the stuff and change into mutants Muckman and Joe Eyeball, blaming Turtles.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Napoleon Bullfrog: Colossus of the Swamps
programme.desc: Krang uses Big Louie to steal anti-freeze to try to start the Technodrome, now stuck in the Arctic. Shredder zaps Turtle pal Napoleon Bullfrog, with mutagen, who mutates into a giant monster and escapes into the city.
programme.sub-title: Napoleon Bullfrog: Colossus of the Swamps

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Raphael vs. The Volcano
programme.desc: Raphael, convinced he is dying due to a faulty reading by Donatell's Health-O-Meter, becomes do-gooder THE Green Defender, popping up around the city foiling crime.

programme.title: Riptide: Harmony And Grits
programme.desc: A seminar about harmony and communucation leads -apart from a fistfight and a bunch of arguments- to a concerned wife who's afraid her husband is having an affair.

programme.title: Riptide: Wipe Out
programme.desc: A so-called accident that took the life of a young surfer in 1964, causes repercussions today.

programme.title: Riptide: Thirty-Six Hours Till Dawn
programme.desc: Luitenant Quinlan and his superiors hire the Riptide Agency to pick up a female witness, ready to testify against her crooked husband.

programme.title: Riptide: Does Not Compute
programme.desc: When somebody is using computers to destroy the reputation of a congressman with controversial ideas, our private investigators decide to help out.

programme.title: Riptide: The Bargain Department
programme.desc: Following the notice from their insurance agent that the agency's bond has been canceled, a high-profile security company offers to buy the Riptide Detective Agency.

programme.title: Riptide: Who Really Watches The Sunset?
programme.desc: A reporter who only has six months to live, hires the Riptide Agency to find out who killed her.

programme.title: Riptide: Still Goin' Steady
programme.desc: Murray has been appearing on a game show, 'Brain Basher'.

programme.title: Riptide: Robin And Marian
programme.desc: When a guy who pretends to be Robin Hood robs almost everyone in king harbor, he accidently takes engraving plates for a counterfeiting scheme.

programme.title: Riptide: Requiem For Icarus
programme.desc: Nick reacquaints with an old buddy who he hasn't seen or heard from in five years.

programme.title: Riptide: Home For Christmas
programme.desc: Nick spends his Christmas arranging the funeral of a dead soldier. But when the wrong body is shipped, he and the team quickly uncover the dark circumstances behind his death.

programme.title: Riptide: Lady Killer
programme.desc: Someone in King Harbor is killing young blonde women, and the Riptide Agency's latest client has an idea who it may be.

programme.title: Riptide: A Matter Of Policy
programme.desc: Things are looking up for Nick when he's named as a beneficiary for a large estate. But soon the team realizes that the money may come at a cost.

programme.title: Riptide: The Wedding Bell Blues
programme.desc: When a millionaire hires the team to find his future wife, they find more than they bargained for, and land in the midst of a mob war.

programme.title: Riptide: The Frankie Kahana Show
programme.desc: While at a lounge listening to a singer from Hawaii, a couple things break up the show, trying to kill the host. Soon, the team is embroiled in a case.

programme.title: Riptide: Smiles We Left Behind
programme.desc: When they go to pick up their dry cleaning, the guys can tell something is upsetting Lucy.

programme.title: Riptide: The Pirate And The Princess
programme.desc: The Riptide crew reunites with Angelo en Giovanna Guirilini as they try to find the lost treasure of captain William Tyson.

programme.title: Riptide: Playing Hardball
programme.desc: A professional baseball team has a drug problem, so Nick and Cody go undercover as players while Murray pretends to be a commentator.

programme.title: Riptide: The Play's The Thing
programme.desc: A string of murders is connected to the search for an undiscovered Shakespeare manuscript and the Riptide agency unhappily teams up with wannabe FBI agent Gloria to find it.

programme.title: Mr. D: Old School
programme.desc: Gerry helps Lisa in her faculty fashion show.

programme.title: Mr. D: Donor Dinner
programme.desc: Gerry tries to charm and gain the support of Xavier Academy's most generous philanthropist.

programme.title: Mr. D: Assistant Leung
programme.desc: Gerry is forced to appoint Mr. Leung as his new assistant coach.

programme.title: Mr. D: Food Drive
programme.desc: Gerry is determined to make sure he wins the prize for Food Drive Month at Xavier Academy.

programme.title: Mr. D: Gerry Gets Gym
programme.desc: Gerry is asked to temporarily fill in for an absent phys-ed teacher.

programme.title: Mr. D: Self Defense
programme.desc: Gerry 'helps' Bobbi with her girls’ self defense class.

programme.title: Mr. D: Graduation
programme.desc: Gerry has a positive interview for a position with Xavier’s main rival school.

programme.title: Mr. D: Mafia Dad
programme.desc: Gerry is finally given an opportunity to coach the varsity boys’ basketball team but finds himself in an awkward position with a player’s dad.

programme.title: Mr. D: Staff Hangover
programme.desc: Morning assembly reveals the Xavier staff in rough shape. Last night’s staff party went late and got messy.

programme.title: Mr. D: President Jimmy
programme.desc: Gerry becomes unexpectedly embroiled in the school’s student council election and is forced to seek the help of an old foe.

programme.title: Mr. D: Callaghan’s Daughter
programme.desc: Callaghan’s daughter is in town visiting, and after seeing her old graduation photo, Gerry wants take her out on a date.

programme.title: Mr. D: Dating Maya Student
programme.desc: Gerry’s former pupil, Maya is back at Xavier as a student teacher and Gerry is having difficulty accepting her as an adult.

programme.title: Mr. D: Short Stocked
programme.desc: Gerry and Bill’s house they rent is up for sale and Gerry uses the advice of a market-savvy student raise enough money for a down payment.

programme.title: Mr. D: Corporal Punishment
programme.desc: Gerry’s father Francis visits Xavier, and Gerry decides to take a page from his father’s book when dealing with an insubordinate student.

programme.title: Mr. D: Lockdown
programme.desc: After encountering an attractive police officer during a lockdown drill, Gerry is determined to see her again.

programme.title: Mr. D: Gerry’s Kid
programme.desc: Gerry bumps into an old fling and her daughter and becomes convinced he’s met the child he never knew he had.

programme.title: Mr. D: Teacher Conference
programme.desc: Gerry meets an attractive woman at Barrel’s and drags Lisa with him to a teacher conference in Atlantic City to find her.

programme.title: Mr. D: Coaching Prospects
programme.desc: Gerry’s star player is being scouted by Syracuse University, and Gerry wants to come along as part of a package deal.

programme.title: Mr. D: Bizarro
programme.desc: Something very strange is happening at Xavier Academy. The day to day goings on of Gerry and the rest of the staff have been completely reversed.

programme.title: Billy On The Street: The Julianne Moore Acting Attack!

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Tenerife Was A 10
programme.desc: The Geordies are going radge in Tenerife! After finally deciding that he prefers Chloe, Sam takes her on a parascending date - but is their relationship about to hit new heights? (S16, ep5)

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Chicken Shop Date
programme.desc: The gang's back in the Toon after the trip to Tenerife and a lack of action sends Sophie and Nathan to horny new levels! Sam's out to impress Chloe, but it's not long before we see tears. (S16, ep6)

programme.title: Geordie Shore: The Girls Get Spiritual
programme.desc: Whilst Nathan puts the newbies through their paces, fighting friends make amends. Sophie has a surprise guest, Sam's in the bad books, and a missing member of the family returns. (S16, ep7)

programme.title: Geordie Shore: The L Bomb
programme.desc: The whole family is finally reunited. A trip north brings old flames Marnie and Aaron closer, and Sam is left grovelling to Chloe. Cracks start to show when Nathan and Marnie come to blows. (S16, ep8)

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Chloe's Barbers
programme.desc: Marnie and Nathan clear the air, Abbie's on the pull, and Sam and Chloe work through their issues. Later, on a night out, things get heated between best friends Steph and Abbie. (S16, ep9)

programme.title: Geordie Shore: The Toilet Trip
programme.desc: It's the last couple of days in the house and the Geordies are going out with a bang! Steph and Abbie make up, and suspicions arise over Marnie and Aaron. Sam asks Chloe on a date. (S16, ep10)

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Australian Additions
programme.desc: The Geordie's are back and this time they're heading to Australia for Tash on Tours down under. The gang are being joined by some new Geordie house mates and some hot locals to live with. (S17, ep1)

programme.title: Geordie Shore: On The Pull
programme.desc: The family are off to the beach for some sun, sea and surfing followed by a real Geordie night which, of course, ends in a food fight. Sam and Chloe hope Abbie and Grant can crack on. (S17, ep2)

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Sneaking Off To Byron Bay
programme.desc: Sam and Chloe's relationship comes under scrutiny from Nathan, causing friction in the house. Will this divide help Nathan and Chloe's bond and allow Sam to get to know the new housemates? (S17, ep3)

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: At just 6 stone 10lbs, 19 year old Tatiana Moxfis extremely underweight and desperate for people to stop asking her if she's got an eating disorder

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: Tipping the scales just over 6 stones, 41-year-old Elizabeth Young thinks she's found the elixer to eternal youth-starving herself.

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: Food hater Louise swaps diets with 39-year-old biker Eddie, who needs to change his diet before it's too late. And Anna Richardson gives up on perfection and accepts what she was born with.

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: Fussy freaky eaters put up a food fight in the feeding clinic as Superskinny Yasmin Smith is forced to swallow a gargantuan diet of snack foods and diet drinks.

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: Last year superskinny Gillian and supersize Phillipa entered the feeding clinic to help each other unlock their dysfunctional relationship with food. How are getting on?

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: This week it’s war in the feeding clinic as Supersized meat addict 47 year old Dawn Grant goes into meltdown when 21 year old Superskinny calorie counting Charlene Sequiera refuses to eat her mountainous meals.

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: Supersized Alyson Mawunga swaps her colossal portions and sugary snacks with superskinny Nick Wood, who lives off caffeine drinks and little else.

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: Thirty-eight-year old Emma Frost is a stubborn calorie counting health enthusiast who weighs in at just over six stone. Scott Hastie is now 25 and a half stone and in danger of health problems.

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: On tonight’s emotional show we revisit 4 people from last series who were in the grip of the life threatening eating disorder, anorexia.

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: Tonight it’s an emotional rollercoaster as Supersize cheese addict Stu Preston takes on Superskinny portion controller Alice Duran. At 27 stone 13lbs Stu is digging himself an early grave with a knife and fork and desperately needs help.

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: Tonight it’s a Supersize Vs Superskinny first-a double swap! Cake-aholicsmother and daughter Janet and Tara Wells swap diets with too busy to eat Joanne Evans and KeithLinage.
programme.sub-title: Janet and Tara vs Joanne and Keith

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Prepare For The Worst
programme.desc: Two gang members threaten to kill Dr. Carroll while he tries to save three men with gunshot wounds; reattaching fingers; car burglar.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Pressure Is Building
programme.desc: There's havoc in the ER again when a boy is rushed in after breathing in an unspecified poisonous chemical. Has it permanently damaged his lungs?

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: CAN'T STOP ITCHING
programme.desc: A man itching from poison oak exposure turns out to also have maggots burrowing into an injury on his back; a young woman has a bleeding lip, but doctors can't find the source of the bleed; three car accident victims are admitted to the ER.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Elements Of Danger
programme.desc: A skier clings to life after slamming into a tree at 50mph. By the time he reaches the hospital he's a talking corpse.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Frat Boy Blues
programme.desc: An entire fraternity is plagued with blue urine; a pregnant woman may loose her baby to a spider bite; and a comatose patient turns out to be a drug runner who swallowed heroin.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: The Big Save
programme.desc: An anesthesiologist has a heart attack; a pregnant woman has a cerebral aneurysm; doctors are sprayed with blood from a man who was stabbed in the heart; a prostitute's unusual hiding place for money is found.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Deadly Impact
programme.desc: A six-year-old Chinese girl is rushed in with intermittent seizures, but with a language barrier, will the doctor find out what's wrong with her?

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: TEMPERATURE RISING
programme.desc: An urgent care physician must invent creative new ways to save a choking child and a man whose hand is covered in tar; a woman's pregnancy is a happy surprise, but complications threaten to upset the joyful news.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Income for a Rainy Day (Part 2)
programme.desc: Vezi and Deborah love the house they purchased last season in Stouffville, but they are ready to make the move to the big city. They enlist the help of Inez Kudryk to show them the best properties she can find in Toronto.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Tricky Choice (Part 1)
programme.desc: Laura and Steven are a young couple with an expanding family, and are ready to take the next steps in home ownership. They want a large plot of land for their young children to run around and enjoy nature.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Tricky Choice (Part 2)
programme.desc: Laura and Steven are a young couple with an expanding family, and are ready to take the next steps in home ownership. They want a large plot of land for their young children to run around and enjoy nature.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: We Bought a Resort (Part 1)
programme.desc: Sofie Kehdi heads back to Belize to help husband and wife team Rachel and Ben size up some resort properties. Along with their investors, Rachel and Ben are looking to purchase a resort on the island of Ambergris Caye.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: We Bought a Resort (Part 2)
programme.desc: Sofie Kehdi heads back to Belize to help husband and wife team Rachel and Ben size up some resort properties. Along with their investors, Rachel and Ben are looking to purchase a resort on the island of Ambergris Caye.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Net Zero
programme.desc: Julie and James are looking for a new home to raise their two boys. James is in the tech industry and would love an energy efficient home.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Wow Factor
programme.desc: Giulia and Scott have recently come into an inheritance and want the house of their dreams. Currently, they live in a modest bungalow in a busy neighbourhood but would prefer to live in a secluded house.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: My Daughter's Plan
programme.desc: Kevin is a retired, successful businessman. He is a single dad to Shannon and Jennifer. Shannon has been accepted into the Ontario Veterinarian College at the University of Guelph.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Feels Like Home
programme.desc: Laura is on the hunt for a new home for long time clients Marino and Paula. The couple and their three kids would like a spacious house with a country feel to escape their hectic lifestyles.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Century Homes
programme.desc: Louise, Jason, and their two children have been living in Europe for the past 10 years, but now they would like to be closer to their family in Canada. Louise absolutely adores the European aesthetic.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Waterfront
programme.desc: Diogo is a dedicated musician working on his new album. He has been debating between moving to Miami or staying in Canada. Toronto is closer to his family and where he feels at home with his music.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Retirement
programme.desc: Elizabeth and Michael are retired and want to move closer to their kids and grandchildren. They want to downsize from their two-story house into a bungalow. Luckily, Eve knows all about luxury bungalows.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Sweet Country Home
programme.desc: Tomarra and Rob had just married and blended their two families. As a new family, they want to transition to a quiet neighbourhood away from the hustle and bustle of Toronto. Steve is up for the challenge.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: A Smart Decision
programme.desc: Darlene and Bruce are in the market for a new home and have enlisted Laura to help them out. Darlene's one request is that they stay close to their current home, where their daughter goes to school.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Pool House
programme.desc: Kathryn and Neil are true urbanites. They love what downtown Toronto has to offer. When Neil found out his company was relocating to Guelph, they weren't thrilled.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Love the Location
programme.desc: Ashley and Ali are ready to take their relationship and living situation to the next level. The young entrepreneurs are prepared to move into a house, but the one thing they can't agree on is where to live.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Big Move
programme.desc: Stephanie is making a big move from BC to Guelph to be closer to her son John and his family. She doesn't want the move to be a hassle and is looking for an accessible, decent-sized home for her grandchildren and visitors from BC.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: My Favourite Homes
programme.desc: Steve Bailey, Mike Donia and Daryl King review their favourite homes. Steve takes us down memory lane to his 18th century farmhouse, and another home with a stunning infinity pool.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: House For an Athlete
programme.desc: ??George is a retired basket ball player, and Mada is an international model. For a man over 7 feet tall, finding the perfect house might be a challenge. Danielle knows high ceilings come in all shapes and sizes.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Treetops
programme.desc: Suhail and Niki have busy schedules. He's a marketing director and she's a doctor so she's often on call for a hospital downtown.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Above and Beyond
programme.desc: Wendy and Daniel are looking to downsize after their kids have moved out, but still want an elegant home. She's a physical therapist and she's a business analyst.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Energized
programme.desc: Danielle is helping quite a pair, Joseph is a chiropractor and Nadia is an aerospace engineer. They're looking for a home to start a family. Not only that, they want space to host their extended family. Will it be as difficult as rocket science?

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Fabulous
programme.desc: Janelle and Manuel are young professionals looking for more space. With one child tagging along on the tour already, they need a place for their growing family. They might need to do some renovations, but they want everything to be perfect.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Fun House
programme.desc: These two business owners Joseph and Heather work hard and want to play hard! They're looking for a place to entertain guests, and Daryl's got some amazing homes to show them.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Condo
programme.desc: Downsizing can be a difficult transition & Jin's objective is to make it as seamless as possible. In this episode, Jin is getting outdoors by practicing archery with Mike but mostly just to compete for bragging rights.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: King's Obsession
programme.desc: It is time to upsize! Daryl's client is moving away from downtown Toronto because they desire a bigger space, more privacy, & tranquility.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Rose Garden
programme.desc: Mike's couple is looking for their luxurious dream home anywhere in between Toronto & Barrie near HWY 400 in a prestigious neighborhood. They have a large dog, tall family, & want to start a family of their own.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Smart Investment
programme.desc: An amazing beachfront property is what Inez's couple is looking for & these top million dollar agents are sure to surpass their expectations.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Bucket List
programme.desc: Mike's friend invites him to an Indian wedding & tells him about his uncle who is looking for a luxury condo close to the airport. Daryl, Inez, & Jin support & donate to Mike's charity.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Right Choice
programme.desc: Somewhere to spend the rest of their days surrounded by nature sounds like a paradise to retire in. Daryl & Jin play some golf to discuss a potential listing she has found & Mike aids Inez in purchasing a new vehicle.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Big City Home
programme.desc: A young trendy couple wants to start a family in Toronto but they need some help from these top million dollar agents. Jin is a natural daredevil & has always wanted to skydive with her clients.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: City Dreams
programme.desc: Moving in together can be stressful but fun because you are starting a new life together! Inez's client is selling their separate properties & looking for a house or condo.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Cottage Getaways
programme.desc: Agreeing on a vacation home is made much harder when these top million dollar agents have astounding listings. Mike's client is looking for a waterfront cottage.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Perfect Neighbourhood
programme.desc: Remarrying is hard enough let alone combining two families under one roof. With a total of 4 children between the ages of 7 & 16 Jin's client is definitely going to need lots of space & land in a safe neighborhood.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Home Sweet Home
programme.desc: Now that Kristen & Kane have opened an office in Toronto, they will be travelling a lot from Vancouver & want somewhere of their own to stay in.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Classic Homes Are Timeless
programme.desc: Many people enjoy staying busy & always having a project on the go. Inez's client loves to build & create breathtaking properties. On their next project, this couple wants an interesting property.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Agents of Million Dollar Homes
programme.desc: Deborah & Vezi are an international couple that want to live in Toronto for one year but has no idea where to start looking. Luckily for them Mike, Jin, Daryl, & Inez have teamed up to find them the home of their dreams.

programme.title: COPS starts at 9pm
programme.desc: Cops gives viewers access into the daily lives and work of the men and women of law enforcement. Filmed on location, the groundbreaking series follows real officers on patrol as they conduct high-speed pursuits, wild arrests and dangerous police business.

programme.title: COPS: Bike for Sale
programme.desc: A deputy pursues a man who fled from a traffic stop. A deputy chases a suspicious man leaving an apartment complex. Two men claim they are trying sell a bike during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS: She Needed a Nap
programme.desc: Deputies pursue a man involved in a carjacking. Deputies are called to an altercation between a father and son. Officers respond to an unresponsive woman lying in a roadway.

programme.title: COPS: Mamma's House
programme.desc: Deputies search for a man who ran from a traffic stop. A man being pursued tells officers he was going to his mother's house. A drunk driver won't admit to hitting a car.

programme.title: COPS: Mean Girls Times Two
programme.desc: Deputies are forced to taser a man after pursuing him into a field. A driver plays dumb when asked about the revolver under his car seat. Officers respond to two teenage girls in a fight.

programme.title: COPS: Backseat Denial
programme.desc: An officer struggles with a man reaching for something in his pocket. A man won't cop to the gun in his backseat. Police arrive on the scene when a man threatens to shoot his wife.

programme.title: COPS: An Innocent Gardener
programme.desc: Officers pursue a vehicle that struck a police car. Two men deny the lawnmower in their truck was stolen. Deputies are called when a mother attempts to run her daughter over.

programme.title: COPS: Penalty Box
programme.desc: A man sneaking away from a bar fight clams he was chased by a truck. Deputies are called when a woman assaults people at a skating rink. A drunk man abandons his truck on train tracks.

programme.title: COPS: Pup and Rescue
programme.desc: A driver denies ownership of what police find in his car. Police conduct a narcotics sting that nets several arrests. A deputy removes a pooch from the scene of an accident.

programme.title: COPS: Undercover Blues
programme.desc: Police work a sting that targets drug dealers. An undercover sting uncovers narcotics trafficking. Police respond to a burglary in progress and discover a flop house.

programme.title: COPS: Multiple Identities
programme.desc: Officers recover a baggie of drugs from a crying suspect. A drunk woman hides a second ID in her back pocket. Police stop a vehicle that hit a patrol car.

programme.title: COPS: Donut Pursuit
programme.desc: Officers pursue a truck after a donut shop robbery. Deputies are dispatched when a wife attacks her husband with an unknown object. Deputies respond to a mother and son knife fight.

programme.title: COPS: Kick the Car
programme.desc: Officers intervene when an estranged husband kicks his ex-wife's boyfriend's car. A man claims someone gave him the car he is driving. A woman claims the pills in her purse are not hers.

programme.title: COPS: Maybe it's Sugar
programme.desc: Police conduct a sting operation. A woman is covered in white powder during a traffic stop. Officers spot a young boy on a bike who wandered away from home.

programme.title: COPS: Not a Momma's Boy
programme.desc: Officers are called to fight between a mother and her son. Officers respond to a man on a trolley hurling racial slurs at a passenger. A traffic stop uncovers narcotics in a young man's trunk.

programme.title: COPS: All Aboard!
programme.desc: Officers pursue a truck driving backwards on a freeway. A suspect jumps a train to evade police. A woman claims to be disabled when a pill falls from her pocket.

programme.title: COPS: To the Lighthouse
programme.desc: Officers are called to a restaurant after the owner was held at gunpoint. Police respond to a woman being sexually harassed in a park. A drunk man tells police he is going to buy a lighthouse.

programme.title: COPS: Get a Room
programme.desc: A man claims to be protecting the car he broke into. Officers are called to when a couple gets too friendly while out in public. Police are dispatched when a drunk woman pounds on her neighbor's door.
